title: nashia armata
intro: Nashia armata, also known as the Chinese boxwood, is a small shrub native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nashia armata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Nashia armata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make traditional remedies and tonics.
